svg.title: Docker Compose full-stack architecture diagram
svg.desc: Shows how a browser request flows through Nginx, React, Node.js/Express, Socket.IO, a PDF worker, and PostgreSQL, with Google OAuth as an external auth provider.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the browser send in an HTTP request to the LAN IP?')
sendPrompt('How does Google OAuth work in this architecture?')
sendPrompt('What does Nginx do as a reverse proxy in this stack?')
sendPrompt('How does React with Vite work as a compiled SPA?')
sendPrompt('What does the Node.js Express API do in this stack?')
sendPrompt('How does Socket.IO enable real-time live sync?')
sendPrompt('What is a worker thread in Node.js and how does receiptWorker.js fit in?')
sendPrompt('How does Prisma ORM work with PostgreSQL?')
